title: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected - Phone Settings Button(Android)
scenario: Tapping Phone Settings button from Device Home Screen with no device connected does not navigate to Android Bluetooth settings
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure no device is connected (Device Home screen shows "No device connected").
3. Tap the Phone Settings button (gear icon) on the Device Home screen.
expected: The user is navigated to the Android Bluetooth settings page.
